use_cases: Display user profile pictures in navigation headers
Show user identity in comment sections
Represent users in chat or messaging interfaces
Display seller/buyer avatars in marketplace platforms
Show team member profiles in dashboard interfaces
ai_summary: A minimalist user avatar component using shadcn/ui design system. Displays a profile image with a fallback initials badge when the image fails to load. Designed for clean, modern interface implementations across various platforms requiring user representation.
